title: Maldor Ring
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Maldor Ring''' was a group of [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] active near [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].

The [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Grefnakk]] was once owned by the Maldor Ring, but he was freed after saving the group's second-in-command during an ambush by rival slavers.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
